title: vitex sumatrana var. urceolata
intro: Vitex sumatrana var. urceolata, also known as the Urceolate Chaste Tree, is a variant of the Vitex sumatrana plant species, belonging to the Lamiaceae family of flowering plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitex sumatrana var. urceolata include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
